parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "Financeiro".pagamentos_mercadopago (
  payment_id, tipo, status, transaction_amount, payment_method_id, destinatario, date_created
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.payment_id }},
  '{{ $json.tipo }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  {{ $json.transaction_amount }},
  '{{ $json.payment_method_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.destinatario.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.date_created }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (payment_id) DO NOTHING;

)
ON CONFLICT (payment_id) DO NOTHING;
